case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. FANNIE PETERS et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
